requestSchema.label: Endpoint URL
requestSchema.description: Full Anthropic Messages URL (e.g. http://localhost:4141/v1/messages). Use for proxies that speak the Anthropic Messages wire format (GitHub Copilot bridges, LiteLLM Anthropic passthrough, etc.).

descriptionI18n.ko: 전체 Anthropic Messages URL (예: http://localhost:4141/v1/messages). Anthropic Messages 포맷을 따르는 프록시용 (GitHub Copilot 브릿지, LiteLLM Anthropic 패스스루 등).

requestSchema.label: API Key
requestSchema.description: Sent as the x-api-key header. Leave empty only when using the no-auth profile.

descriptionI18n.ko: x-api-key 헤더로 전송됩니다. 인증 없는 프로파일을 쓸 때만 비워두세요.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Model identifier accepted by the upstream endpoint (e.g. claude-fable-5). Suggestions are first-party Claude IDs; any value the upstream accepts can be typed.

descriptionI18n.ko: 상위 엔드포인트가 허용하는 모델 ID (예: claude-fable-5). 제안 목록은 first-party Claude ID이며, 상위 엔드포인트가 허용하는 값이면 자유 입력 가능합니다.

requestSchema.label: Max Tokens
requestSchema.description: Anthropic Messages requires max_tokens on every request.

descriptionI18n.ko: Anthropic Messages는 모든 요청에 max_tokens가 필요합니다.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by the upstream endpoint and selected model, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Endpoint URL
requestSchema.description: Bedrock mantle Anthropic Messages URL (region-specific). Pattern: https://bedrock-mantle.{region}.api.aws/anthropic/v1/messages

descriptionI18n.ko: Bedrock mantle Anthropic Messages URL (리전별). 형식: https://bedrock-mantle.{region}.api.aws/anthropic/v1/messages

requestSchema.label: API Key (Bedrock bearer token)
requestSchema.description: Bedrock bearer token, sent as the x-api-key header. This path supports bearer-token auth only (SigV4 requires the dedicated AWS SDK client).

descriptionI18n.ko: Bedrock bearer 토큰 (x-api-key 헤더로 전송). 이 경로는 bearer 인증만 지원합니다 (SigV4는 전용 AWS SDK 클라이언트 필요).

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Bedrock model identifier (carries the anthropic. provider prefix).

descriptionI18n.ko: Bedrock 모델 ID (anthropic. 프로바이더 접두사 포함).

requestSchema.label: Max Tokens
requestSchema.description: Anthropic Messages requires max_tokens on every request.

descriptionI18n.ko: Anthropic Messages는 모든 요청에 max_tokens가 필요합니다.

requestSchema.label: Thinking Mode
requestSchema.description: Adaptive thinking. Always on (cannot be disabled) on Claude Fable 5; available on Opus 4.6 and later.

descriptionI18n.ko: 적응형 thinking. Claude Fable 5에서는 상시 활성(비활성화 불가), Opus 4.6 이상에서 지원.

requestSchema.label: Thinking Effort
requestSchema.description: Supported on Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8/4.7/4.6, Sonnet 4.6. xhigh/max are Fable/Opus-tier only.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by the selected Bedrock model, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

descriptionI18n.ko: Bedrock OpenAI 호환 chat completions URL (리전별).
Bedrock에서 발급한 Bearer 토큰 / API 키.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Model identifier accepted by DeepInfra (e.g. meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth for thinking models. Suggestions follow the gpt-5 family; type a custom value if your model uses a different scale. Only applies to reasoning-capable models.

descriptionI18n.ko: 추론(사고) 강도. 제안값은 gpt-5 계열 기준이며, 다른 스케일을 쓰는 모델은 값을 직접 입력하세요. reasoning 지원 모델에만 적용.

limits.notes: Model-dependent gateway. Context and output token limits vary by selected model, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

notesI18n.ko: 모델별 게이트웨이. 컨텍스트·출력 토큰 한도가 선택 모델에 따라 달라, 고정 한도 슬라이더 대신 숫자 입력을 사용합니다.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth for thinking models. 'none' disables thinking.

descriptionI18n.ko: 추론(사고) 강도. thinking 모델에 적용 (none은 비활성).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Cloud-hosted model. Local Ollama cloud models commonly use the :cloud suffix (e.g. gpt-oss:120b-cloud), while direct ollama.com API examples may use the bare model name (e.g. gpt-oss:120b). See https://ollama.com/search?c=cloud for the current list.

descriptionI18n.ko: 클라우드 호스팅 모델. 로컬 Ollama의 클라우드 모델은 보통 :cloud 접미사를 사용하지만(예: gpt-oss:120b-cloud), ollama.com 직접 API 예시는 접미사 없는 모델명도 사용합니다(예: gpt-oss:120b). 최신 목록은 https://ollama.com/search?c=cloud 참조.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth for thinking models (gpt-oss, etc.). 'none' disables thinking.

descriptionI18n.ko: 추론(사고) 강도. gpt-oss 등 thinking 모델에 적용 (none은 비활성).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

descriptionI18n.ko: Ollama OpenAI 호환 chat completions URL.

requestSchema.label: API Key (optional)
requestSchema.description: Only required if the Ollama server enforces a token.

descriptionI18n.ko: Ollama 서버가 토큰을 요구할 때만 필요합니다.

requestSchema.label: Context Window (num_ctx)
requestSchema.description: Model context window size in tokens. Overrides model default.

descriptionI18n.ko: 컨텍스트 윈도우 크기(토큰). 모델 기본값을 덮어씁니다.

requestSchema.label: Repeat Last N
requestSchema.description: Token window to consider for repeat penalty.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: API Key
requestSchema.description: Bearer token. Leave empty for endpoints without auth.

descriptionI18n.ko: Bearer 토큰. 인증이 없는 엔드포인트는 비워두세요.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Model identifier accepted by the upstream endpoint.

requestSchema.label: Top K
requestSchema.description: Some upstream providers (Together / Fireworks / DeepInfra) accept top_k.

descriptionI18n.ko: 일부 상위 공급자(Together / Fireworks / DeepInfra)는 top_k를 받습니다.
반복을 페널티 처리 (Together / Fireworks / vLLM 확장).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Forward reasoning hints to compatible models.

requestSchema.label: Transforms
requestSchema.description: Content transforms (e.g. `middle-out` to compact long contexts).

descriptionI18n.ko: 공급자 라우팅 설정 (order, ignore, allow_fallbacks 등).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth. The gateway maps this to each model's native thinking config (e.g. Gemini thinkingLevel/thinkingBudget, OpenAI reasoning effort).

descriptionI18n.ko: 추론(사고) 강도. 게이트웨이가 모델별 thinking 설정(Gemini thinkingLevel/thinkingBudget, OpenAI reasoning effort 등)으로 변환합니다.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Endpoint URL
requestSchema.description: Replace PROJECT_ID in 'projects/PROJECT_ID' with your own GCP project ID (or number). Find it on the Google Cloud Console dashboard. Keep the rest of the URL as-is; the model name is appended automatically.

descriptionI18n.ko: 'projects/PROJECT_ID' 부분의 PROJECT_ID를 본인 GCP 프로젝트 ID(또는 번호)로 바꾸세요. Google Cloud 콘솔 대시보드에서 확인할 수 있어요. 나머지 URL은 그대로 두면 되고, 모델 이름은 자동으로 붙습니다.

requestSchema.label: Service Account JSON
requestSchema.description: Full Service Account JSON for OAuth token exchange. Needs the Vertex AI User role on the project.

descriptionI18n.ko: OAuth 토큰 교환용 Service Account 전체 JSON. 해당 프로젝트에 Vertex AI 사용자 역할이 필요해요.

requestSchema.label: Service Account JSON
requestSchema.description: Full Service Account JSON for OAuth token exchange.

descriptionI18n.ko: OAuth 토큰 교환용 Service Account 전체 JSON.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth. Maps to Gemini thinking_budget (2.5) / thinking_level (3.x).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: API Key
requestSchema.description: Wellspring API key (ws-...). Bound to your arca.live account.

descriptionI18n.ko: Wellspring(챈섭) API 키 (ws-...). arca.live 계정에 연동됩니다.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Unified reasoning depth knob (Wellspring gateway). 'none' disables thinking; 'max' is the deepest. Only applies to reasoning-capable models.

descriptionI18n.ko: 통합 추론 강도 (Wellspring 게이트웨이). none은 thinking 끄기, max가 가장 깊음. reasoning 지원 모델에만 적용.

limits.notes: Community-run arca.live API. Wellspring enforces a per-request input cap (max_input_tokens) and per-model output/RPM limits exposed via /v1/models/{id}; per-profile limits below reflect those host-enforced caps, not native model context windows.

anthropic:fable-5.description: Claude Fable 5 via the Anthropic Messages API. Adaptive thinking is always on (thinking cannot be disabled); control depth with effort.

descriptionI18n.ko: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic Messages API). 적응형 thinking 상시 활성(비활성화 불가), effort로 추론 강도 조절.

schema.label: Thinking Mode
schema.description: Adaptive thinking is always on for Claude Fable 5; it cannot be disabled.

descriptionI18n.ko: Claude Fable 5는 적응형 thinking이 상시 활성이며 비활성화할 수 없습니다.

schema.label: Extended Thinking
schema.description: Enable manual extended thinking for supported Claude models. Leave unset to omit the thinking object.

anthropic-compatible:custom-noauth.description: Generic Anthropic Messages endpoint without authentication. Use for local bridges (e.g. a GitHub Copilot proxy on localhost) or any gateway that does not require an API key.

anthropic-compatible:custom.description: Generic Anthropic Messages endpoint. Provide your own URL, key, and model id. Use for proxies that speak the Anthropic wire format (e.g. a GitHub Copilot bridge).

descriptionI18n.ko: 범용 Anthropic Messages 엔드포인트. URL, 키, 모델 ID를 직접 입력합니다. Anthropic 포맷을 따르는 프록시용 (예: GitHub Copilot 브릿지).

bedrock-anthropic:custom.description: Claude on Amazon Bedrock via the native Anthropic Messages endpoint (bedrock-mantle, bearer token). Pick a model (e.g. Claude Fable 5) and provide your region URL and bearer token.

schema.description: Thinking token budget for Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite. -1 = automatic, 0 disables (where supported); explicit values up to 24576.
